title: cpvp ice
description: ice pvp pack to get better at pvp :D
body:
![Ice pack to get better](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866ad503ac6b12fb4c8d7321c6e99be74768547b.jpeg)

This ice pack has many modern feature like

- better crystals
- better sword
- better anchors
- better enderpearl
- better totems
- better obsidian
- better xp
- better armor 
- better pickaxe 
- no explosion effekt


  and more
